Matthew B. Weber, Esq., Goldstein, Gellman, Melbostad, Gibson & Harris, 621-5600, for plaintiff and moving party Diane Herynk.
Robert O. Schmidt, Esq., 332-3049, for defendant and opposing party Arlene Perry.

Counsel are required to submit a joint list of three companies (agents) or 2 separate lists if counsel cannot agree by 4/2/03. Counsel are also to meet and discuss the $7000 issue.
